blocking_issues: sample counts not fully reconstructable from exported event ledger
market regime and sector not persisted
positive_evidence: Researcher explicitly says no pattern is approved
negative_evidence: spread, slippage and bid/ask are not persisted
representative examples are not a full raw event ledger

required_next_actions.action: Run and maintain Director approval gate script.
required_next_actions.expected_output: director_gate.py returns non-zero when promotion is blocked.
required_next_actions.acceptance_criteria: Current 2026-06-07 package is schema-valid but Director-gate-blocked due to zero trades/fills and missing OOS/regime evidence.

required_next_actions.expected_output: pattern_events.csv rows reconstruct sample_count and independent_sample_count with source ids and timestamp cutoffs.
required_next_actions.acceptance_criteria: For every pattern, independent_sample_count equals verified independent event rows or is explicitly marked as upstream_count with source hash.

required_next_actions.action: Demote/block promotion statuses without paper trades/fills.
required_next_actions.expected_output: No paper_candidate/premium_candidate status in packages with zero trades or fills.
required_next_actions.acceptance_criteria: Validator or Director gate blocks promoted statuses below the configured minimum paper trades/fills.

required_next_actions.action: Add OOS, ticker holdout, period holdout, bootstrap, permutation and multiple-testing metrics.
required_next_actions.expected_output: Additional columns/files for OOS robustness and adjusted statistical evidence.
required_next_actions.acceptance_criteria: Top candidates survive net-cost OOS with adjusted evidence, not just in-sample R metrics.

required_next_actions.action: Persist market regime, sector and execution-cost inputs.
required_next_actions.expected_output: metrics_by_regime.csv plus bid/ask/spread/slippage fields where available.
required_next_actions.acceptance_criteria: Director can audit concentration and execution realism before any promotion.

process_improvements: separate schema validation from Director promotion eligibility through director_gate.py
separate upstream sample_count from exported_event_count and verified independent sample count
block paper/premium statuses without paper trades/fills
prevent unauthenticated health endpoint account balance exposure
require PR scope to match actual changed files
